Keith A. Ehrman, Esq. of MCGUINN, HILLSMAN & PALEFSKY 421-9292, for plaintiff and opposing party
* A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- defendant PILLSBURY WINSTROP LLP's motion to strike claims for punitive damages in plaintiff's second amended complaint is DENIED, 15 days leave to answer. (JJM/301/MD) Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855

MINI MINUTES:

Phyllis A. Jaudes, Esq. and Richard A. Jackson, Esq. of ROGERS JOSEPH O'DONNELL & PHILLIPS 956-2828 for defendants PILLSBURY WINTHROP LLP moving to strike cliams for punitive damges
Kyann C. Kalin, Esq. of PERKINS COIE LLP 344-7000 for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Defendant PILLSBURY WINTHROP's motion to strike claims for punitive damages and for award of costs -- Motion to strike is granted with leave to amend within 10 days. Motion for award of costs denied. Order signed in open court. (JJM/kf-x) Reporter: Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
